notes.text: GalleryGrid.tsx already implements the click-to-reveal lightbox: fullscreen overlay with objectFit:contain (uncropped full image), prev/next arrow buttons, keyboard nav (Arrow keys + Escape), and touch swipe. The 'reveal full image with no crop' requirement is already satisfied by existing code.

Current grid is a column-based MASONRY, not a uniform grid. app/foodphotography/page.tsx (and property) pass photos through buildColumns(photos, layout) from galleryColumns. Each restaurant has a per-section layout: columnLayout (explicit column assignments), columnCount, and photoOverrides.forcedRatio. By default thumbnails render at NATURAL aspect ratio (width:100%, height auto), so column heights stagger. Only cells with forcedRatio get aspectRatio + object-fit:cover.

User wants food (/foodphotography) and property (/propertyphotography) portfolio grid thumbnails to be uniform/neat using a 4:3 aspect ratio (cropped), while clicking an image reveals the full uncropped image.

payload.context: Discuss: changing food/property portfolio grids to uniform 4:3 thumbnails with uncropped full reveal on click. Grounding findings from reading code.
